files.reason: Wait for live commit parity after Railway upload, then run the full ship check automatically.
Adds the live verification, deploy handoff, and real proof-call scripts used to prove the shipped path.
Always trigger post-call intelligence after call end so summaries are attempted on production calls.
Tightens buyer activation/login flow so payment follows activation request and invite-based access is clearer.
files.excerpt:
diff --git a/src/App.tsx b/src/App.tsx index 36e10d2..31a4d29 100644 --- a/src/App.tsx +++ b/src/App.tsx @@ -7259,3 +7259,3 @@ function ProspectingPage() {

Database Reactivation

-

+

Upload old leads, auto-dial with a personalized pitch, and create callback tasks from your existing database

I can take real action: call contacts, book appointments, create tasks, update settings, and edit agent prompts. What do you need?", + content: "Hey — I'm SMIRK. I can take real action: call contacts, create callback tasks, update settings, and edit agent prompts. What do you need?", },
